stimulus.content:
Read the passage below:

Mrs. Ruiz told her class about the duties of being a citizen. She said that some duties are required by law. Others are things that good citizens choose to do on their own.

stem: Based on the passage, which duty is required by law for citizens in the United States?

choices.text: Helping out at a food bank
Serving on a jury when called

answer_explanation: Jury duty is required by law. When citizens are called to serve on a jury, they must go to court. Helping at a food bank, giving to charity, and going to meetings are good things to do, but they are not required by law.
